ValidationRule.description: If Interest Waived off dates are entered, Interest Waiver flag should be set to true
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Disable_Metadata_Settings__c.Disable_Product_Validation_WF__c == false, OR(NOT(ISNULL( Interest_Waived_Off_Start_Date__c )),NOT(ISNULL( Interest_Waived_Of_End_Date__c )) ), Interest_Waived_Off__c = false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please check Interest Waived Off to true
